faqs.question: How much does yellow jacket removal cost in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket removal in Metuchen typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests are usually less expensive, while nests in walls, attics, or high locations may cost more. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Metuchen for aggressive yellow jacket situations. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, including treatment and ensuring all yellow jackets are eliminated. We serve all Metuchen neighborhoods and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call.

faqs.question: When is yellow jacket season in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket season in Metuchen runs from late spring through fall, with peak activity and aggression occurring in August and September. Colonies can grow to contain thousands of workers by late summer, making professional removal essential. Early detection and removal in spring or early summer can prevent larger infestations.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to my Metuchen family?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are aggressive and can sting multiple times, unlike bees. They become particularly defensive when their nest is threatened and can chase intruders for considerable distances. For individuals with allergies, stings can cause severe reactions requiring immediate medical attention. Professional removal is the safest option to protect your family and pets.
